name: LanguageSpeak
title: NDH Language Speak
description: This extension enables NDH to represent spoken language capability at telecom contact points, using extensible binding to LanguagesVS to improve language-concordant access and communication routing; it is used in HealthcareService.telecom, Location.telecom, and Organization.telecom.

element.definition: This extension enables NDH to represent spoken language capability at telecom contact points, using extensible binding to LanguagesVS to improve language-concordant access and communication routing; it is used in HealthcareService.telecom, Location.telecom, and Organization.telecom.
